pi_items.source: Task description and required Kubernetes operations correspond to these roles.
setup_task.sh explicitly loops over and creates these three namespaces via kubectl.
setup_task.sh creates the specification document precisely at this path.
verifier.py evaluates success based on the condition 'passed = score >= 70'.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically provisions three synthetic Kubernetes namespaces ('fintech-prod', 'fintech-staging', 'fintech-dev') without resource quotas or limits. The agent must implement governance policies by applying ResourceQuotas and LimitRanges exactly as specified in the generated file at '/home/ga/Desktop/resource_governance_spec.yaml'. The evaluation scripts strictly verify these exact parameters and enforce a passing threshold of 70 points.
